# leifwind_field (Data Source)

Look up a single field by id or exact name within a project/entity.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by id.
data "leifwind_field" "by_id" {
  project_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  entity_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
  id         = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"
}

# Look up by exact name.
data "leifwind_field" "by_name" {
  project_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  entity_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
  name       = "title"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_id` (String) Owning entity id (UUID).
- `project_id` (String) Owning project id (UUID).

### Optional

- `id` (String) Field object id (UUID).
- `name` (String) Exact field name.

### Read-Only

- `connection_type` (String) Connection type.
- `data_type` (String) Data type.
- `fragment_name` (String) Fragment the field belongs to (FRAGMENT connection only).
- `unique_key` (String) Server-computed natural key.
